creator: demelier.david@gmail.com
text:
There is a lot of warning using ath(4) and joining a WPA-EAP point :

$ dmesg
[...]
ath0: bad series0 hwrate 0x1b, tries 1 ts_status 0x0
ath0: bad series0 hwrate 0x1b, tries 1 ts_status 0x0
ath0: bad series0 hwrate 0x1b, tries 1 ts_status 0x0
ath0: bad series0 hwrate 0x1b, tries 1 ts_status 0x0
ath0: bad series0 hwrate 0x1b, tries 1 ts_status 0x0

It fills /var/log/messages constantly, about 600 lines in one hour.

How-To-Repeat: Use ath(4)
